item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 10min 𝗦𝗠𝗨𝗗𝗚𝗘𝗥 𝗕𝗔𝗖𝗞 𝗜𝗡𝗧𝗢 𝗦𝗜𝗡𝗗𝗘𝗟𝗙𝗜𝗡𝗚𝗘𝗡 𝗙𝗜𝗡𝗔𝗟
Ross Smith is through to the final of the European
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 10min 𝗦𝗠𝗨𝗗𝗚𝗘𝗥 𝗕𝗔𝗖𝗞 𝗜𝗡𝗧𝗢 𝗦𝗜𝗡𝗗𝗘𝗟𝗙𝗜𝗡𝗚𝗘𝗡 𝗙𝗜𝗡𝗔𝗟
Ross Smith is through to the final of the European Grand Prix for the second time in three years following a hard-fought 7-5 victory over Krzysztof Ratajski Ross Smith 1 3 816

item.title:
Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 12min Ross Smith enters a fourth European Tour Final!
Smudger sailed into a 3-0 lead and never looke
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 12min Ross Smith enters a fourth European Tour Final!
Smudger sailed into a 3-0 lead and never looked back after Ratajski missed his first TEN darts at double.
Ross Smith 7 - 5 Krzysztof Ratajski
In association with @DiamondXDraws
#Darts #RossSmith #KrzysztofRatajski 129

item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 13min SMITH INTO THE FINAL!
Ross Smith is a finalist in Sindelfingen once again, as Smudger be
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 13min SMITH INTO THE FINAL!
Ross Smith is a finalist in Sindelfingen once again, as Smudger beats Krzysztof Ratajski 7-5 to go one game away from glory at the European Darts Grand Prix
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 2 5 52 7 mil

item.title: PDCResults: PDCResults @PDCResults · 14min (R): European Tour 5 - European Darts Grand Prix 2026, Semi Final, Krzysztof Ratajski (95
item.description: PDCResults @PDCResults · 14min (R): European Tour 5 - European Darts Grand Prix 2026, Semi Final, Krzysztof Ratajski (95.55) 5 (13) 7 (90.58) Ross Smith 190

item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 22min SEVEN INTO THE NINE!
Krzysztof Ratajski goes seven darts into the perfect leg and ends
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 22min SEVEN INTO THE NINE!
Krzysztof Ratajski goes seven darts into the perfect leg and ends up losing the leg!
The Polish Eagle misses three darts and Ross Smith cleans up to take a two-leg lead.
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 1 1 37 11 mil
